title: Quickselect — K-th Smallest
description: Given n integers and k, find the k-th smallest element (1-indexed) without fully sorting the array.
inputSpec: First line: n and k. Second line: n integers.

botCodes.code:
import random
def qselect(a,k):
    if len(a)==1:return a[0]
    p=random.choice(a)
    lo=[x for x in a if x<p]
    eq=[x for x in a if x==p]
    hi=[x for x in a if x>p]
    if k<=len(lo):return qselect(lo,k)
    elif k<=len(lo)+len(eq):return p
    else:return qselect(hi,k-len(lo)-len(eq))
n,k=map(int,input().split())
a=list(map(int,input().split()))
print(qselect(a,k))
let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id and k=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let a=Array.init n(fun _->Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) in Array.sort compare a;Printf.printf"%d\n" a.(k-1)
